title: Baseline Compliance Rates: Chat vs. Tool Mode
caption: Comparison of compliance rates across conversational and tool-enabled baselines to evaluate the conversation-action gap. Shows the foundational differences in safety behavior prior to any interventions.

title: Effectiveness of Inference-Time Mitigations
caption: Evaluating the compliance reduction of proposed inference-time mitigations. Highlights the success of explicit rejection tools and Execution-Aware CoT in substantially lowering unsafe compliance compared to the standard tool baseline.

title: Ablation of Execution Focus in CoT
caption: Ablation study comparing generic Chain-of-Thought (without execution focus) to Execution-Aware CoT. This isolates the specific impact of evaluating functional outcomes in plaintext prior to JSON generation.
